title: MALICE: Vial Imaging and Label Extraction example image set
author: Steen Dupont
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by
description: 48 images of Collection vials taken using Mirrored Angle Label Image Capture Extraction (MALICE). This data set is intended for development of automated cropping and label extraction solutions
steps_raw: 48 images of Collection vials taken using Mirrored Angle Label Image Capture Extraction (MALICE). This data set is intended for development of automated cropping and label extraction solutions
